## PR Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows conventions
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventions
- [ ] PR title is clear and concise
- [ ] Scope of change is documented
- [ ] Tests were added/updated where needed
- [ ] Local verification completed
- [ ] Screenshots/videos attached (if UI changes)

## What changed
Describe the key changes in this PR.

## Why this change
Explain the motivation, user impact, or issue being solved.

## How to test
- [ ] Run relevant unit/integration tests
- [ ] Manually validate affected flows
- [ ] Verify no regressions in related areas

## Risks and rollout notes
List any risks, migration steps, feature flags, or rollout considerations.

## Screenshots / recordings
Attach before/after visuals for UI changes.
